title: Charred Energizing Venezuelan Pepper Skewers
description: Experience the vibrant flavors of Venezuela with this charred and crisp pepper skewer dish, perfect for a quick weeknight meal.

ingredients.name: red bell peppers
ingredients.notes: any color peppers work, but red is traditional

instructions: Prepare a hot stone plate by heating it in the oven at 5000F for 10 minutes.
Thread 2-3 red bell pepper pieces, 2-3 chicken breast pieces, and 1-2 cornmeal-coated onions onto each skewer.
In a small bowl, mix together lime juice, garlic, and a pinch of salt and pepper for the marinade.
Brush the skewers with olive oil and brush the peppers with olive oil as well.
Marinate the chicken for at least 30 minutes, or up to 2 hours in the refrigerator.
Heat the stone plate in the oven at 5000F for 5 minutes before cooking the skewers.
Cook the skewers for 5-6 minutes per side, or until the chicken is cooked through and the peppers are charred.
Garnish with chopped cilantro, queso fresco, and a squeeze of lime juice.
Let the skewers rest for 2-3 minutes before serving, to allow the juices to redistribute.
